You can also use this Ethereum QR Code on your web site or social media. It makes it easier for people to send you ETH. Just right click on the QR Code and choose 'save-as' to download it to your device.

  • What's a QR Code?
  • How to Use a QR Code
  • What's Ethereum?
QR Code is short for 'Quick-Response Code'. It's a type of barcode made up of black and white squares that are arranged on a square grid. Through software, a QR Code can be read by consumer imaging devices like the cameras on computers and mobile phones. The image is processed with error correcting software to read the stored data.
You can use the generated QR Code by scanning it with your phone using an application that supports the decoding of QR Codes. They have been heavily adopted by cryptocurrency wallets and make payments or transfers of cryptocurrencies faster and easier. You can also right click on the generated image to save it, this allows you to easily add it to a web site.
Ethereum is a cryptocurrency with a blockchain that supports smart contracts. Smart contracts are non-changable programs that are written to the blockahin. that have the potential to allow the elimination of trusted intermediators (banks, brokers and governments) and helps create a platform for decentralized finanace (DeFi).
